scripts.dev: concurrently -n docs,react,vue,vanilla -c cyan,green,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:docs" "pnpm dev:react" "pnpm dev:vue" "pnpm dev:vanilla"
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @virt-list/core run build && pnpm --filter @virt-list/vanilla run build && pnpm --filter @virt-list/vue --filter @virt-list/react run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -C docs typecheck && pnpm -C docs/apps/react typecheck && pnpm -C docs/apps/vue typecheck
